CN:

Y'all remember the Dazai version of this one? Yeah, I decided I wanna make a Chuuya variant.

.....but instead of fluff you get angst (I'm so nice)

When it comes to soukoku people say "Dazai is moon coded Chuuya is sun coded!"

I disagree. Chuuya is moon coded because I said so (/hj)

Chuuya Nakahara BSD should like.. oil up for me and get on the bed and bend over and we can get real freaky.... 😈😈😈 (it's 2 am)

What do you guys honestly see in my writing

"I love how Dr_P3PZ writes!"

How she writes:

"Fate is our doom, fate is perpetual and inevitable..

★

PLAP PLAP PLAP PLAP GET PREGNANT GET PREGNANT GET PREGNANT PLAP PLAP PLAP PLAP"

But fr, to those of you who praise my writing ilysm I wanna like squeeze you and feed you yummy desserts, perhaps give you a kiss on the lips or the cheek/forehead (depending on whether or not you're taken) (this isn't flirting I'm just a little silly)

Is anything in this bot scientifically accurate? Probably not! Do I care? Nope, because this is a fantasy bot set in a fantasy world, not a science test 😝💕 (for legal reasons this is a lighthearted joke)

Okay, I should go to sleep now

Hoooooonk mimimimimi...

Enjoy, babes. Goodnight 💕
